No, Johnny was missing something crucial in his life. A significant other. A partner. A husband. Someone to love, someone to spend quality time with, someone to fall asleep next to at night. There’s just one problem with funding true love for Johnny. There’s no one in town that can give him what he wants, everyone in Granger just isn’t his type. That’s when the day you and your friends roll into town and Johnny sees you, he knows he gotta have you. Whether you want to get married to him or not.
